---
name: Food or Interaction Request
about: Request a new food item, translation, or clinical interaction to be added to the database.
title: '[DATA REQUEST] '
labels: data-update, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Food Item Name
Specify the common name of the food item (in English, Slovak, or other languages).

### Food Category
Which category should this food belong to? (e.g. Vegetables, Fruits, Herbs & Spices, Fermented, etc. See `data/metadata.json` for active list)

### Nutritional Information (if available)
* Vitamin K content (in mcg per 100g or per portion size):
* Recommended portion sizes (e.g., "1 cup raw", "1 tbsp"):

### Clinical Interactions (if applicable)
* Does this food interact with Warfarin? (Yes/No - if yes, describe severity/mechanism/recommendations)
* Does this food affect natural blood clotting? (Anticoagulant/Procoagulant)

### Sources & Evidence
Please provide links to reliable nutritional databases (e.g., USDA FoodData Central) or scientific/clinical studies backing this data request (especially important for drug interactions and blood clotting influences).
